Appearances:
Plaintiff Osla Young is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mariya Matveyeva is present.
Attorney Dany Pikman representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel's and litigants confer in hallway.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of SEP-04-2012 remains on calendar.
